$description: NEW category. Captures the standalone UI opacity literals currently raw in src/styles.css (0.7, 0.6, 0.5, 0.4) as named tokens by intended usage. Keyframe endpoints (0/1) are animation states, not design tokens, and are intentionally excluded. The --folia-* opacity vars are now defined in the .folia-root token block; these tokens are byte-matched against it.
